analysis.name: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (Ondo Tokenized Stock)
analysis.summary: TSMON是台积电的代币化股票，近期价格跟随TSM上涨，但流动性极低，市值仅约1147万美元，24小时交易量140万美元。缺乏直接催化，上涨主要受AI和半导体板块情绪带动。

recommendation.invalidation: 若TSM基本面恶化或代币流动性进一步枯竭，则逻辑失效

catalysts: AI芯片需求持续增长，台积电作为主要代工厂受益
NVIDIA等大客户财报超预期可能带动板块情绪

latestNews.title: Nvidia Earnings Today Could Swing AI Trade: AMD, Intel, TSMC Among Stocks To Watch
latestNews.reason: NVIDIA财报可能提振AI相关股票，TSM作为关键供应商受益

fundamentals: TSMON是Ondo发行的代币化股票，1:1锚定TSM股票
总供应量约24924枚，完全稀释市值1147万美元
支持24/5交易，但流动性远低于传统TSM
marketRead: 24小时价格下跌0.7%，但7日涨幅7.8%，14日涨幅11%，30日涨幅14%
交易量140万美元，相对市值较大，但绝对量低，易被操纵
无Binance等主流交易所数据，仅限Ondo平台交易
risks: 流动性极低，买卖价差可能很大，难以大额进出
代币化股票监管不确定性，非美国用户可能受限
价格高度依赖TSM，但TSMON折溢价可能偏离
sourceNotes: 数据来自CoinMarketCap，Binance API受限无法获取交易对
新闻多为聚合内容，时效性一般

profile.name: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (Ondo Tokenized Stock)
profile.description: TSMon is the Ondo Tokenized version of Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing, giving tokenholders economic exposure similar to holding TSM and reinvesting any dividends. Ondo tokenized stocks enable non-US retail and institutional users around the world to instantly mint and redeem tokenized U.S. stocks and ETFs, 24 hours a day, five days a week with full access to traditional exchange liquidity. Additional restrictions apply. Learn more at ondo.finance/global-markets.
